level_signals: Multiple examples of leading cross functional teams to achieve material business success

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Full spectrum product veteran with multiple examples of leading cross functional teams to achieve material business success, ideally in tech scale-ups.
Results driven and execution focused – enjoys forging a path through an ambiguous and rapidly evolving environments.
Insatiably curiosity with a first principles approach to product growth.
AI / ML literate - understands LLM limits, evals, performance/latency/cost trade-offs, data pipelines, guardrails, and can quickly gain respect of Eng/Research.
Leading the strategy and execution of our world beating Voice AI products from development to GTM.
Helping us scale at pace by accelerating our Product Led Growth with developers, implementing GTM engineering approaches and building momentum in our ICPs.
Effectively gathering market, customer and technical understanding and driving the product roadmap based on this.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Specific Voice AI experience certainly helps!
Full spectrum product veteran with multiple examples of leading cross functional teams to achieve material business success, ideally in tech scale-ups.

scope.surface: Speechmatics Voice AI portfolio — products from development to GTM
scope.business_model: B2B enterprise and developer-facing, API/platform, speech intelligence
core_responsibilities: Leading the strategy and execution of our world beating Voice AI products from development to GTM.
Igniting enthusiasm internally and externally about what we are doing and why.
Helping us scale at pace by accelerating our Product Led Growth with developers, implementing GTM engineering approaches and building momentum in our ICPs.
Effectively gathering market, customer and technical understanding and driving the product roadmap based on this.
Transforming customer insights into product roadmaps and aligning cross-functional stakeholders
Accelerating the global adoption of Speechmatics' Voice AI technology

green_flags: Explicitly encourages applications from candidates who don't match all requirements exactly
Clear product surface: Voice AI portfolio with explicit GTM and PLG focus
Described culture emphasises focus time (Focus Fridays) and collaboration (Together Tuesdays)
Comprehensive benefits mentioned including Private Medical, Dental, parental leave, pension/401K matching, global working opportunities
Diversity and inclusion commitment explicitly stated
red_flags: No specific city listed — unclear which office location is required for hybrid days
Visa sponsorship and work authorisation requirements not stated
Seniority experience bar is described qualitatively ('full spectrum product veteran', 'multiple examples') without quantifiable years, making it harder to self-screen

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from title and qualitative descriptions; no years stated)
scope.business_model (inferred from company description and product context)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not explicitly stated in JD)
location.cities_listed (no specific city named for this role)
location.remote_us_eligible (inferred false given hybrid requirement; not explicitly stated)
ambiguities: Location city not specified — the JD references hybrid 2-3 days/week but does not name the office city. Speechmatics is headquartered in Cambridge, UK, but this is not confirmed in the JD body for this role.

tech_scaleup_background appears in both must_haves (as a primary criterion) and nice_to_haves (because 'ideally' qualifier makes it preferred) — captured in nice_to_haves only to avoid duplication; the parent must_have covers the full sentence.
Work authorisation and visa sponsorship are not mentioned anywhere in the JD; set to 'unclear'.
The JD mentions 'global working opportunities' in benefits but does not clarify if the role itself is open to global applicants or US-based applicants.
